creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
"undeclared identifier 'BIO_s_file_internal'"

During BSDCan 2018 the intention to update OpenSSL in base to 1.1.x branch was documented.

Intention is to update OpenSSL in 12-STABLE to 1.1.1 when that is released. 

Poudriere log: https://keg.brnrd.eu/data/111amd64-default-openssl110/2018-08-17_12h10m13s/logs/errors/mongodb-2.6.12_5.log
